Title: Boris Pistorius, the man preparing Germany for war
Subhead: The country's most popular politician for the past three years, who serves as defense minister under Chancellor Olaf Scholz, is set to unveil a military strategy review on Wednesday aimed at making the Bundeswehr the leading conventional army in Europe. Title: The playful world of British painter Rose Wylie exhibited for the first time in France
Subhead: The 91-year-old British painter, who has become recognized late in her career and is known for her deceptively naïve style, is holding her first solo show in France at the Zwirner Gallery in Paris. There, she pays tribute to the French artist Le Douanier Rousseau, reinterpreting his work 'Mauvaise surprise' ('Unpleasant Surprise').
